retrieved_note: Re-verified 2026-05-25 against the Jan-Jun 2026 Schedule of Charges (SOC), the Jan-Jun 2026 Credit Card KFS, the Jul-Dec 2025 JS Signature (Private Banking) KFS, and current jsbl.com product pages.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced fee of PKR 1,200 charged on spending PKR 25,000 within 1 month of card activation.

notes: Verified against Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Section A, JS Bank Credit Card VISA, Classic) and Jan-Jun 2026 KFS: annual fee Rs. 5,000 with reduced Rs. 1,200 on Rs. 25,000 spend in first month.
Supplementary card annual fee Rs. 2,000 (reduced Rs. 1,000 on Rs. 25,000 spend) per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC.
Joining fee: 'No Card Issuance or Joining Fee' per KFS.
Salary PKR 70,000 sourced from the comparison table on jsbl.com/personal/credit-card/ and jsbl.com/js-credit-card/.
Age 18 inferred as standard credit-card minimum; no published maximum age.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced fee of PKR 3,100 charged on spending PKR 100,000 within 1 month of card activation.

notes: Verified against Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Section A, JS Bank Credit Card VISA, Platinum) and Jan-Jun 2026 KFS: annual fee Rs. 15,000 with reduced Rs. 3,100 on Rs. 100,000 spend in first month.
Supplementary card annual fee Rs. 6,500 (reduced Rs. 2,700 on Rs. 100,000 spend).
Salary PKR 70,000 sourced from the product comparison table on jsbl.com.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: PayPak Debit Card annual fee waived for JS Inclusive Current Account holders; also waived on JS Elite Current Account.

notes: Annual fee corrected to Rs. 1,500 per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Section A.xiii PayPak Debit Card); supplementary Rs. 750; one-time issuance Rs. 1,000.
JS Asaan Current Account is the lowest-friction route: PKR 100 initial deposit, no minimum monthly average balance.
JS Inclusive Current Account explicitly grants PayPak debit annual-fee waiver.
Account-linked debit card; no separate salary or balance threshold for the card itself.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Mastercard Gold debit annual fee waived on JS Premier Raabta Current Account with previous 3 months' average balance of PKR 150,000 and above; also waived on JS Elite Plus Current Account and JS L/CY Current Account.

notes: Annual fee corrected from Rs. 1,650 (Jul-Dec 2025 SOC) to Rs. 2,500 per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Section A.iii Mastercard Gold). Annual retention fee Rs. 250.
Issuance fee Rs. 1,000 (per Mastercard Debit Card Issuance Fee row).

Waiver pivoted: the Jan-Jun 2026 SOC ties the cleanest published Gold-debit waiver to JS Premier Raabta (PKR 150,000 avg balance). JS PLS Savings page still advertises 'Free MasterCard Gold debit card annual fee' but the SOC doesn't surface a numeric threshold for PLS specifically.
Account-linked debit card.
Annual fee Rs. 17,000 verified against Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Mastercard World row and Private Banking section).
Supplementary Rs. 8,500; principal-card replacement Rs. 12,500.

JS Priority Banking proposition page lists the relationship threshold as PKR 3 million for current account or PKR 8 million for savings account, 3-month average. Modeled here as the current-account floor (PKR 3,000,000).
No published fee waiver in the SOC for World Mastercard; the card is positioned as a Private Banking / Priority Banking benefit.
Annual fee corrected from Rs. 1,200 (Jul-Dec 2025 SOC) to Rs. 1,500 per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Section A.xiii PayPak Debit Card).
Likely a duplicate listing of the PayPak Classic Debit Card; the SOC only describes one PayPak debit product line.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Titanium Mastercard Debit Card annual fee free on JS HER Current Account when monthly average balance of PKR 50,000 is maintained.

notes: Annual fee corrected from Rs. 0 (account-fee modelling) to Rs. 3,500 standalone per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Mastercard Titanium row); fee becomes free under the JS HER waiver.
JS HER Current Account requires PKR 50,000 monthly average balance to unlock the Titanium debit annual-fee waiver (SOC Section iii JS HER Current Account; her-finances page confirms).
Women-targeted card; treated as a tier variant of Mastercard Titanium under the HER proposition.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Platinum Mastercard Debit Card annual fee waived on JS Platinum Business Current Account when previous 3 months' average balance is PKR 150,000 and above.

notes: Annual fee corrected from Rs. 3,000 (Jul-Dec 2025 SOC) to Rs. 7,000 per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Mastercard Platinum row).
Annual retention fee Rs. 350; supplementary Rs. 3,500; replacement Rs. 3,500.
Waiver verified: JS Platinum Business Current Account, previous 3 months' average balance Rs. 150,000 & above (SOC Fee Waivers Section i).
Annual fee corrected from Rs. 1,200 (Jul-Dec 2025 SOC) to Rs. 3,500 per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Mastercard Titanium row). Annual retention fee Rs. 300.
No standalone product-level salary or balance threshold published; eligibility flows through the linked account.

cards.card_name: Private Banking Visa Signature Credit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced fee of PKR 7,700 charged on spending PKR 150,000 within 1 month of card activation.

notes: Verified against Jan-Jun 2026 SOC (Section F Private Banking, PB Signature Credit Card row) and the JS Signature KFS: annual fee Rs. 20,000 with reduced Rs. 7,700 on Rs. 150,000 spend in first month.
Supplementary card annual fee Rs. 8,000 (reduced Rs. 7,200 on Rs. 150,000 spend) per KFS.
Bank-retained reduced fee of PKR 7,700 even after spend target is met; this is not a true waiver.
Card positioned under JS Private Banking / Priority Banking; relationship threshold inherited from Priority Banking (PKR 3 million current or PKR 8 million savings, 3-month average).

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reduced fee of PKR 1,800 charged on spending PKR 50,000 within 1 month of card activation.

notes: Annual fee corrected from Rs. 5,000 (the value previously tagged here looked like a Classic-tier carry-over) to Rs. 8,500 per Jan-Jun 2026 SOC and KFS (JS Bank Credit Card VISA, Gold).
Reduced fee corrected from Rs. 2,000 to Rs. 1,800 on Rs. 50,000 first-month spend per SOC/KFS.
Supplementary card annual fee Rs. 3,500 (reduced Rs. 1,500 on Rs. 50,000 spend).
The product page lists this as 'JS Gold' under JS Bank Credit Card VISA; 'Visa Gold Credit Card' is the same card.
Salary PKR 70,000 sourced from the shared comparison table on jsbl.com.

gaps: JS Bank does not publish a salary threshold for any debit card; debit-card salary remains null and the linked-account balance is the eligibility lever.
Maximum age is not published on any card or KFS page.

JS PLS Savings page still advertises a free Mastercard Gold debit annual fee, but the current SOC does not state a numeric average-balance threshold for PLS specifically; the cleanest published Gold-debit waiver path is JS Premier Raabta (PKR 150,000).

Document requirements (CNIC, salary slip, bank statement) are not explicitly enumerated for credit cards on the product page; modelled as true based on standard Pakistani credit-card practice and the KFS reference to 'proof of income'.
